executive_summary: Global instability is elevated. The high Supply Chain Stress Score and dwindling Fuel Reserves are exacerbated by the Middle East Energy Spike, indicating resource vulnerability. Media panic in Taiwan is a concerning outlier that warrants immediate investigation to determine its root cause, as physical impact is presently low.
correlations: Supply Chain Stress and Global Fuel Reserves are tightly linked; supply chain issues directly impact the accessibility and distribution of fuel.
